rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee contracts in component type scopes; use implementation annexes for bindings valid in the implementation scope.
Insert AGREE annex blocks within `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax in the appropriate AADL component scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by avoiding structural redesign during fusion.
Use only visible identifiers from the current component scope in AGREE contracts.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or data types not present in the analyzed model.
Ensure AGREE clauses reference valid component ports, subcomponents, and connections.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts define interface behavior; implementation contracts define internal bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid variables or outputs.
Do not introduce new package references or data types not found in the input AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax and annex placement rules
Model validator diagnostics and repair patterns
